title: danthonia semiannularis
intro: Danthonia semiannularis, also known as blue oat grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia, characterized by its bright blue-green leaves and delicate, feathery plumes. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, blue oat grass has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. Blue oat grass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
